question: How can I move to Zimbabwe
answer: To move to Zimbabwe you generally need to obtain the appropriate visa or residence permit from the Zimbabwe Embassy in your country, provide proof of employment or sufficient funds, arrange accommodation, and submit a health certificate. Visit the Zimbabwe Immigration Department website (www.zimimmigration.gov.zw) for the latest requirements.

question: What documents do I need to relocate to Sweden
answer: You need a valid passport, a residence permit (applied via Migrationsverket), proof of employment or study acceptance, health insurance, and proof of accommodation in Sweden.

question: How long does the Swedish residence permit take
answer: Processing times vary. A work permit typically takes 30-90 days. A family reunification permit can take 3-12 months. You can track your case status on the Migrationsverket website.

question: Can I bring my pet when moving abroad
answer: Yes, but requirements differ by country. For Sweden you need an EU pet passport or health certificate, microchip, rabies vaccination, and sometimes a tapeworm treatment. Check the Swedish Board of Agriculture (Jordbruksverket) for exact rules.
